name: ai-to-ai-holding-customs
description: Thai Trade Intelligence MCP Server — HS Code classification, duty calculation, OGA compliance, FTA rates

tools.name: classify_hs_code
tools.description: Classify a product into Thai Customs HS Code. Returns top HS code candidates with confidence scores and legal citations. Output is decision-support only, not a binding classification.

product_description.description: Product description in any language (Thai or English)

origin_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of origin (e.g. CN, US, JP)

value_usd.description: CIF value in USD (optional, for duty calculation)

tools.name: check_fta_rate
tools.description: Look up preferential import duty rate under FTA agreements between Thailand and origin country. Covers RCEP, AFTA, ACFTA, AJCEP, AKFTA, AANZFTA, AIFTA, TAFTA, TNZCEP, JTEPA, TCFTA, TPFTA, MFN.

tools.name: check_oga_compliance
tools.description: Check if a product requires Other Government Agency (OGA) permits or inspections before import into Thailand. Returns list of required agencies (FDA, TISI/มอก., FDA-TH, AERONAUTICS_DEPT, etc.)

tools.name: sandbox_classify
tools.description: Free trial classification — no API key required. Rate limited to 20 req/min. Returns mock results suitable for testing integration.
